sources.struggle: Trapped in abusive marriage, life-or-death decision to flee
perseverance: Three years in homeless shelters while pursuing degree
Working full-time, attending classes three nights a week
Therapy sessions with daughters to work through trauma
Keeping up with rent while homeless
sources.breakthrough: Graduation - hearing kids yell her name, becoming homeowner in dream neighborhood
emotionalMoments: Life-or-death decision to flee abusive husband
Three years in shelters while pursuing degree
Therapy with daughters - showing them nothing to be ashamed of
Working full-time, school three nights a week, single mom
Graduation moment - hearing kids yell from crowd
Homeowner in subdivision where she used to trick-or-treat

sources.struggle: Childhood trauma (taken at 12, raped, molested, beaten), pandemic eviction
perseverance: Quit job to prioritize kids' education during pandemic
Protecting kids from knowing they were homeless
Three months in shelters
Attending counseling sessions for single mothers
sources.breakthrough: Becoming advocate for families facing eviction, educating about tenant rights
emotionalMoments: Quit job to prioritize kids' education
Protecting kids - 'they didn't think we were homeless'
Hotel shelter - own room felt like home
Becoming advocate - helping others face eviction

sources.struggle: 23 years in abusive relationship, 'he was going to try to kill me'
perseverance: Pressing charges, finally leaving
'Baby taking a dive into the real world'
Pursuing associate degree while working as caregiver
School + work + 6 kids - overwhelmed but didn't give up
sources.breakthrough: Own home with backyard, first Christmas tree without criticism
emotionalMoments: 'I thought he was going to try to kill me'
'I was invisible most of my life'
'Baby taking a dive into the real world'
Future goal: advocate for domestic violence survivors

sources.struggle: Pregnant, loses home after father's funeral, 3 years in shelters, son with complex disabilities
perseverance: Proving homelessness while pregnant (10 days of bureaucracy)
Three years in shelter programs
First apartment was disaster (drugs, infected)
Son turned down from daycares - can't work
Finding purpose through advocacy
sources.breakthrough: Becoming advocate - speaking to policy makers, 'I have power as a constituent'
emotionalMoments: Returns to US, loses home while pregnant
Son's disabilities - no childcare, can't work
'I don't know where I would be if I wasn't an advocate'

sources.struggle: Homeless single mom of 5 kids under 8, abuse survivor, body-image issues, trust issues
perseverance: Walking into Dress for Success despite fear
Three-week job-readiness program
Volunteering, then working at Dress for Success
Laid off but 'notable absence of despair'
Starting Beyond A J.O.B.
sources.breakthrough: Mirror moment - 'they SAW me', first suit, becoming CEO, creating space for teen mothers
emotionalMoments: Body-image issues as plus-size Black woman
Walking into Dress for Success - fear
'They SAW me. I mean, they saw me' - mirror moment
First suit she'd ever owned - transformation
Laid off - but no despair this time
Creating space for teen mothers - full circle

sources.struggle: Husband's accidental overdose death, 'alone for the rest of my life', also lost son Ryder
perseverance: Daily snowsuit battles - 'soul-crushing'
Finding ways to keep Kevin in their lives
Kitchen dance parties, graveside birthdays
Grief counseling
Polar Bear Dip decision
sources.breakthrough: Polar Bear Dip - 'renewed, strong, ready to kick ass', redecorating, dating, living 'happy-ish'
emotionalMoments: Snowsuit battles - 'alone for the rest of my life'
Grief counseling - 'they DO have a dad'
'This is where the dead people go!' - dark humor

sources.struggle: Homeless with 6-year-old and 3-month-old, 'failed them miserably', working from hospital bed
perseverance: Working from hospital bed 48 hours after birth
Selling everything
Hiding single-mom status in interviews
Sobbing in car after daycare drop-off
Parents' spare room, midnight feedings + emails
Every lunch hour making client calls
sources.breakthrough: Vision board achievement, $1 million business, Hawaii trip, new house
emotionalMoments: Working from hospital bed 48 hours after birth
Sobbing in car after daycare drop-off
Parents' spare room, midnight feedings + emails

sources.struggle: Abused by two family members, ran away at 15, homeless at 17 with baby
perseverance: Receptionist, 3 kids, struggling
Rediscovered sewing 2008
Started blog
Made skirt, got requests
Hating fulfillment, pivoting to teaching
Quit day job 2012
sources.breakthrough: 'Thousands of dollars' surprise, 80,000 students, million-dollar brand, 'safe place to share'
emotionalMoments: Childhood: sewing with aunt in Puerto Rico
'I woke up to thousands of dollars'
Quit day job - leap of faith
